heading: Purchase or rental of approved areas or interests therein; gifts and devises; United States lands
label: 715d Purchase or rental of approved areas or interests therein; gifts and devises; United States lands
notes: Amendments1978— incorporated existing provisions in pars. (1) and (2) and cls. (A) and (B), made provisions applicable to interests in approved areas, and inserted authority for purchase or acquisition for other management purposes.Pub. L. 95–616

Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions of Secretary of Agriculture to Secretary of the Interior by Reorg. Plan No. II of 1939, see Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 715a of this title
amendments: Amendments1978— incorporated existing provisions in pars. (1) and (2) and cls. (A) and (B), made provisions applicable to interests in approved areas, and inserted authority for purchase or acquisition for other management purposes.Pub. L. 95–616

children.text: purchase or rent such areas or interests therein as have been approved for purchase or rental by the Commission at the price or prices fixed by the Commission; and
acquire, by gift or devise, any area or interests therein;
